name: OBSIDIAN PROTOCOL — Detection Coverage
description: MITRE ATT&CK technique coverage map for the VECTOR-I (CVE-2021-41773/42013) and VECTOR-II (CVE-2021-4034) attack chain, based on Purple Team validation results. Green = caught by the WARDEN module, Red = detection gap (not caught).

techniques.comment: Used in the OBSIDIAN PROTOCOL operation: VECTOR-I: Apache version verification (recon). Status: DETECTION GAP - not caught
Used in the OBSIDIAN PROTOCOL operation: VECTOR-I: Reading secrets.env via path traversal. Status: caught by WARDEN
Used in the OBSIDIAN PROTOCOL operation: VECTOR-I: RCE via CGI redirection (command execution). Status: caught by WARDEN
Used in the OBSIDIAN PROTOCOL operation: VECTOR-II: Escalation to root via the PwnKit exploit. Status: caught by WARDEN
